name: login_user
description: Authenticate a user with their email/username and password. Returns a JWT access token, refresh token, and user profile on success. Supports MFA challenges.

parameters.name: loginId
parameters.description: The user's email address or username.

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: The application UUID to authenticate against. Required if the user is registered to multiple apps.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: The user's IP address for geo-location and security.

parameters.name: noJWT
parameters.description: If true, do not return a JWT. Useful for verification only.
